title: Aurora, 73746, Pompom Penguin, 9In, Soft Toy, Grey and White
availability_text: Only 15 left in stock (more on the way).
features: From Aurora's fabulous range of collectible Pom Pom Penguins
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Adorable Pom Pom Penguin soft toy in a two tone plush material with sparkly eyes
Children will love this cute and hugely collectible Penguin.
description: Product Description From Aurora World’s highly popular range of collectible Pom Pom Penguins, we bring you our gorgeous grey and white Pom Pom Penguin. With sparkly eyes, white belly, orange feet and nose, he is the super soft, cuddly and the perfect gift. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products. Box Contains 1 x Pompom Penguin 9In
